summary: Tested Phase 2-5 self-edit improvements. Backend health check passes. Code review confirms all 4 phases implemented correctly. UI testing partially successful - self-edit flow with patch_files tool verified working (status 'Saving 1 file(s) directly' observed). Navigation issue persists when clicking New Chat from Core System Workspace.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'New Chat' from Core System Workspace hub sometimes navigates to main Projects page instead of opening a new Core System chat. Conversations also not persisting between page loads.

action_items: Fix Core System New Chat navigation to stay in Core System mode
Investigate conversation persistence issue in Core System Workspace
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 2 (Silent Validation Retries): VERIFIED - message-stream.js lines 1622-1700 implement retry logic with corrective context when patches fail

Phase 3 (Auto-Reload after Apply to Live): VERIFIED - live-promote.js lines 118-138 clear require.cache and touch files with utimes; CodeTab.jsx shows 'Hot-reload triggered' and 'Reload Complete' toasts
Phase 4 (Enhanced Diff View): VERIFIED - CodeTab.jsx lines 370-460 implement line numbers, change stats summary (+N additions, -N removals, X → Y lines), and collapsed unchanged regions
Phase 5 (request_router import fix): VERIFIED - message-stream.js line 779 uses correct 'routeRequest' export name
All data-testids present: apply-to-live-btn, rollback-live-btn, toggle-diff-btn, diff-view, diff-summary, core-live-controls, sync-repo-btn
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2-5 features are all implemented correctly in code. The self-edit flow with patch_files tool works (verified via UI showing 'Saving 1 file(s) directly' status). The main issue is Core System navigation - clicking New Chat sometimes redirects to Projects page. To test the enhanced diff view, need to: 1) Complete a self-edit, 2) Click on Code tab, 3) Click on a file in the tree, 4) Click the Diff button to see line numbers and change stats.

code_verification_results.phase_2_silent_retries: VERIFIED - selfEditPatchRetry counter at line 385, retry logic at lines 1622-1700
code_verification_results.phase_3_auto_reload: VERIFIED - require.cache clearing and utimes at lines 125-136 in live-promote.js, toast notifications in CodeTab.jsx
code_verification_results.phase_4_enhanced_diff: VERIFIED - Line numbers, change stats summary, collapsed unchanged regions all implemented in CodeTab.jsx lines 370-460
code_verification_results.phase_5_import_fix: VERIFIED - routeRequest import at message-stream.js line 779
code_verification_results.no_compilation_errors: VERIFIED - No 'cannot reassign' errors in frontend logs
